title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Don Chinjao, Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #3 as the Colosseum fighters, Tontatta rebellion, and Straw Hat alliance move closer to the same target: Doflamingo’s hidden system.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How strange... how'd this ice get like this!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Our fires don't melt it and our axis can't shatter it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Even though that pirate treasure under the ice is right there, before our eyes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This con- tinent is called "The icy treasure Bed" ... in order to crack it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: One must focus an incredible amount of power into just one point....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: Drilling Dragon Auger Spike!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UWA H!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OPEN, CHINIAO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Did you fellows like that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hiya hoho hoho!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: 01!! Take these treasure thieves...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Tie them up, and send them out to sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hiyaho, oh, how happy this makes me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Okay, Boss!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Uwahh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Within this icy pit lies my life's work!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Everything I've endured in the past and all my hopes for the future!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: happou pirate navy's 12th leader, "CHIN]JO THE AUGER" (30 years earlier)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hundreds of years' worth of treasure, amassed by our clan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And my "Auger head" is the only key to unlock it all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Not another soul can get in!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: 01, Chinjao, as preparation for cracking open your skull....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I put aside the punching bag and trained by reducing eight mountains to dust!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: HiyaHo!! Well it was all for nothing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: There's nothing in this world harder than my head!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: Prepare yourself, Chinjao!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll break even that beloved head-split- ting fist of yours!!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: Garp!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Nuuu... AH!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ohhhhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: OHH!!?

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
